data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — AC1: tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh PASSED: 2 FAILED: 0. AC2: grep -nw tk CLAUDE.md | grep -v ticket | grep -v .tickets-tracker returns empty. Note: ticket latest comment references tests/hooks/ path which does not exist — actual test is at tests/scripts/ (no action needed, file ownership is 1992-e2af)
